---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for dopa
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? For an ADHD/dopamine-aware tool, describe the
real situation (e.g. "I lose track of time in hyperfocus and miss breaks") rather than
just the proposed mechanism.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Which part of dopa?

- [ ] `/dopa` Claude Code skill
- [ ] Sensor daemon
- [ ] New sensor / marker
- [ ] Interventions / notifications
- [ ] Privacy / local-first controls
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Privacy considerations

dopa is local-first and privacy-first by default. If your request involves collecting
or transmitting new data, describe what stays local vs. what (if anything) would leave
the machine, and whether it should be opt-in.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
